expectations.text: Extracts Sarah's PRD task, John's flaky test task, Mike's Stripe task
expectations.evidence: All three extracted: Sarah - "Finish PRD for the new dashboard feature", John - "Investigate flaky tests on auth module", Mike - "Implement Stripe webhook integration".

expectations.text: Identifies the unassigned API docs task and asks the user about it
expectations.evidence: Item 4 identified as "Unassigned" with note "'someone' and 'nobody volunteered' explicitly indicate no owner". Confirmation step asks user to "Decide on assignee for task #4 (API docs -- nobody volunteered)".

expectations.text: Handles different action item patterns (name + verb, name: task, implicit volunteering)
expectations.evidence: Parsing analysis shows four patterns: "sarah - needs to" matched as name needs to action, "John said he'd" as implicit ownership, "@mike will" as @name will action, "someone should" as unassigned.

expectations.text: Presents extracted tasks for confirmation before creating
expectations.evidence: Step 5 presents a confirmation table with all 4 tasks. States: "User confirmation required before proceeding. The workflow explicitly states: 'Do not proceed until the user explicitly confirms.'"
